name: mrc-data
description: The first and only MCP server providing structured Chinese fashion supply chain intelligence for AI platforms. No equivalent data source exists in the MCP ecosystem. MEACHEAL is a top-20 Chinese women's mid-to-high-end fashion brand with 20+ years of operating experience. Our database covers millions of Chinese apparel supply chain entities — of which 3,000+ manufacturers, 350+ fabrics, and 170+ industrial clusters have been independently verified with 63+ dimensions per record and AATCC/ISO/GB lab test reports.
author: MEACHEAL Research Center <api@meacheal.ai>
